description: Generate tints and shades for a base color (lighter/darker steps) with hex values.

description.name: name_color
description.description: Get the closest human-readable name for one or more colors. Pass a single hex or several comma-separated (e.g. "#3b82f6,#000,#ff7f50"); returns each input with its nearest color name, the reference hex, an exact-match flag and the perceptual distance.

description.name: extract_colors
description.description: Extract a dominant-color palette from an image URL. Each color comes back with its hex, rgb, hsl, share of the image, and the closest human color name — a named palette in one call.

description.name: search_palettes
description.description: Search the color-palette catalog by name, tone, temperature, mood, harmony, exact color count and tags. Returns a paginated list.

description.name: get_palette
description.description: Get one color palette by id: its colors (hex), name/derived title, mood, harmony, temperature and tags.

description.name: minify_code
description.description: Minify or beautify JS, CSS, HTML, SVG, JSON or XML. Set type=auto to sniff the language.

description.name: detect_code
description.description: Detect the language/format of a code snippet.

description.name: convert_code
description.description: Convert code between formats (e.g. JSON↔YAML, CSS↔SCSS). Use list_code_converters for valid from/to ids and per-converter options.

description.name: list_code_converters
description.description: List available code converters with their from/to ids and per-converter option schemas.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_font, get_font_files, get_font_download_url · Private data: get_font_files · Public sink: extract_colors · Destructive: get_font_files, detect_code.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_font, get_font_files, get_font_download_url · Private data: get_font_files · Public sink: extract_colors · Destructive: get_font_files, detect_code

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
